---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  - id: "all"
    # categories: numbered
    contents:
      - "."
    exclude:
      filename:
        - "index.qmd"
    feed: true
    fields:
      - "title"
      - "date"
      - "image"
      - "categories"
      - "description"
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title"
    type: default
share: false
---

::: {.category-buttons}
[All](.){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[blog (84)](#category=blog){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[diary (10)](#category=diary){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[memo (4)](#category=memo){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[tech (1)](#category=tech){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[tech-ai (21)](#category=tech-ai){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[tech-data (8)](#category=tech-data){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[tech-others (31)](#category=tech-others){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[tech-vim (13)](#category=tech-vim){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[vim-jp (2)](#category=vim-jp){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

## 複数エージェント構成シリーズ

1. [なぜ複数エージェントなのか](2026-07-14-why-multi-agent.qmd)
2. [tmux は生き残るが、見える形は消える](2026-07-14-tmux-survives-visible-form-disappears.qmd)
3. [エージェントを使った作業のための二つの状態機械](2026-07-14-two-state-machines-for-agent-work.qmd)
4. [個人用コンピューターの中の会社](2026-07-14-company-inside-personal-computer.qmd)

::: {#all}
:::
